title: Expose lichen native library in Zephyr module build
description: Why this issue exists: a native-enabled puck build using the t1000_e board config aborts because CONFIG_LICHEN_NATIVE is undefined. lichen/zephyr/Kconfig and lichen/zephyr/CMakeLists.txt include drivers and subsys but not lichen/lib, so lichen/lib/native is not visible to that app build. What needs to be done: decide whether lichen/lib should be part of the Zephyr module extension and, if so, wire lib/Kconfig and lib/CMakeLists.txt into the module build so CONFIG_LICHEN_NATIVE can be enabled by app board configs.
close_reason: Wired lichen/lib Kconfig and CMake into the Zephyr module extension. Verified on EC2 with nrf52840dk/nrf52840 gateway build using CONFIG_LICHEN_NATIVE=y and native.c compiled into liblichen_native.a.
